title: Tangy Velvety Egyptian Onion Stir-fry
description: This tangy and velvety dish features scallions and fermented substances to provide a hangover-cure effect in a nut-free-friendly version.

ingredients.name: Fermented black garlic paste (for flavor enhancement)
Soy sauce (tamari or gluten-free soy sauce)

instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add sliced onions and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic, fermented black garlic paste, soy sauce, Worcestershire sauce, and lemon juice. Bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let the mixture cook for another 10-12 minutes or until it's reduced slightly and onions are soft.
Slice scallions thinly and add them to the pan. Cook for an additional 3 minutes.
Remove from heat, adjust seasoning if necessary, and serve as a snack.
